title: Reading a Hydrograph
description: Anatomy of a storm hydrograph — rising limb, peak, recession — with an interactive BFI explorer, a storm-pair comparison revealing non-linear runoff response, and a live Python cell that generates CAMELS-style annual hydrographs for three contrasting gauges.

citation.text: Lyne, V. & Hollick, M. (1979). Stochastic time-variable rainfall-runoff modelling. Inst. Eng. Australia Nat. Conf. Publ. 79/10, 89–93.

author: Mohammad Galib, Purdue University
